marketplace.name: Phobos
marketplace.description: Clear the demons to prove you're human. A real DOOM-engine captcha.

pass_kills.name: Kills to pass
pass_kills.description: Demons the visitor must kill for the round to count as solved.

start_level.name: Start arena
start_level.description: Which campaign arena the captcha round runs on. The server rebuilds this exact arena when it replays the run.

wave_count.name: Monster count
wave_count.description: How many demons spawn into the arena from the per-round seed.

skill.name: Skill
skill.description: DOOM skill level. 5 is Nightmare (faster, more aggressive demons).

respawn_monsters.name: Respawning monsters
respawn_monsters.description: Killed demons respawn, so a slow solver always has targets.

time_limit.name: Time limit (tics)
time_limit.description: Optional solve budget in game tics (35 = 1 second). 0 means no limit.

bg.name: Background
bg.description: Stage background behind the canvas and overlays.

button_bg.name: Primary button bg
button_bg.description: Background of the primary action button.

button_text.name: Primary button text
button_text.description: Text on the primary action button.

button_hover.name: Primary button hover bg
button_hover.description: Hover background of the primary action button.

hud_bg.name: HUD background
hud_bg.description: Background of the kill counter and touch controls.

badge_bg.name: Verified badge bg
badge_bg.description: Background of the Verified badge shown on success.

focus_ring.name: Focus ring
focus_ring.description: Outline shown on the canvas when keyboard focus enters.

ariaGame.name: Game region label
ariaGame.description: Screen-reader label for the whole play area.

startTitle.name: Start screen title
startTitle.description: Headline on the start screen before the round begins.

startBody.name: Start screen body
startBody.description: Short instruction on the start screen telling the visitor to clear the demons to verify.

startButton.name: Start button
startButton.description: Label for the button that begins the round.

controlsHint.name: Controls hint
controlsHint.description: Small keyboard/mouse controls reminder under the start button.

verifiedBadge.name: Verified badge
verifiedBadge.description: Short badge shown once the kill goal is met and the captcha is satisfied.

ariaForward.name: Forward control label
ariaForward.description: Screen-reader / touch-button label for moving forward.

ariaTurnLeft.name: Turn-left control label
ariaTurnLeft.description: Screen-reader / touch-button label for turning left.

ariaTurnRight.name: Turn-right control label
ariaTurnRight.description: Screen-reader / touch-button label for turning right.

ariaFire.name: Fire control label
ariaFire.description: Screen-reader / touch-button label for the fire action.

announceStart.name: Announcer: round started
announceStart.description: Live-region message when the round begins.

announceVerified.name: Announcer: verified
announceVerified.description: Live-region message when the kill goal is reached and the captcha is satisfied; invites the visitor to keep playing.

levelClearTitle.name: Level cleared title
levelClearTitle.description: Headline shown when every demon in the level has been killed. The level number is interpolated.

levelClearBody.name: Level cleared body
levelClearBody.description: Short complimentary message shown when a level is cleared.

nextLevelButton.name: Next level button
nextLevelButton.description: Label for the button that advances to the next, harder level. Must read clearly as moving to a new level.

loading.name: Loading label
loading.description: Shown on the start button while the game engine loads.

loadError.name: Load error label
loadError.description: Shown on the start button if the game engine fails to load.

replayButton.name: Replay button
replayButton.description: Label for the button that restarts the current level from the level-cleared screen.

diedTitle.name: Died title
diedTitle.description: Headline shown when the player is killed before verifying.

diedBody.name: Died body
diedBody.description: Message prompting the player to try again after dying before verifying.

diedVerifiedBody.name: Died-but-verified body
diedVerifiedBody.description: Message when the player dies on a level AFTER already passing the captcha. Must acknowledge both that verification still counts and that this level was not cleared (do not reuse the win copy).

muteSound.name: Mute sound label
muteSound.description: Screen-reader label for the speaker button when sound is on (clicking it mutes).

unmuteSound.name: Unmute sound label
unmuteSound.description: Screen-reader label for the speaker button when sound is muted (clicking it unmutes).

announceCleared.name: Arena cleared announcement
announceCleared.description: Live-region message announced the moment the last demon falls, before the level-cleared screen.

English.ariaGame: Play DOOM and clear the demons to verify.
English.startBody: Clear the demons to prove you're human.
English.controlsHint: Arrows or WASD to move, Space or click to fire
English.diedVerifiedBody: You already passed, but the demons got you this round.

Chinese (Simplified).ariaGame: 玩 DOOM，清除恶魔来完成验证。
Chinese (Simplified).startBody: 清除恶魔，证明你是真人。
Chinese (Simplified).controlsHint: 方向键或 WASD 移动，空格或点击开火
Chinese (Simplified).diedVerifiedBody: 你已经通过验证了，但这一关被恶魔翻了盘。

Spanish.ariaGame: Juega a DOOM y limpia los demonios para verificarte.
Spanish.startBody: Limpia los demonios para demostrar que eres humano.
Spanish.controlsHint: Flechas o WASD para moverte, Espacio o clic para disparar
Spanish.diedVerifiedBody: Ya estás verificado, pero los demonios te alcanzaron en esta ronda.

Arabic.ariaGame: العب DOOM وأبِد الشياطين لإتمام التحقق.
Arabic.controlsHint: الأسهم أو WASD للحركة، مسافة أو نقرة لإطلاق النار
Arabic.diedVerifiedBody: تحققتَ بالفعل، لكن الشياطين نالت منك هذه الجولة.

Portuguese.ariaGame: Jogue DOOM e elimine os demônios para se verificar.
Portuguese.startBody: Elimine os demônios para provar que você é humano.
Portuguese.controlsHint: Setas ou WASD para mover, Espaço ou clique para atirar
Portuguese.diedVerifiedBody: Você já está verificado, mas os demônios te pegaram nesta rodada.

French.ariaGame: Jouez à DOOM et éliminez les démons pour vous vérifier.
French.startBody: Éliminez les démons pour prouver que vous êtes humain.
French.controlsHint: Flèches ou WASD pour bouger, Espace ou clic pour tirer
French.announceVerified: Vérifié. Vous pouvez continuer à jouer.
French.diedVerifiedBody: Vous êtes déjà vérifié, mais les démons vous ont eu cette manche.

German.ariaGame: Spiel DOOM und räum die Dämonen weg, um dich zu verifizieren.
German.startBody: Räum die Dämonen weg, um zu beweisen, dass du ein Mensch bist.
German.controlsHint: Pfeiltasten oder WASD zum Bewegen, Leertaste oder Klick zum Schießen
German.diedBody: Versuch es noch mal, um dich zu verifizieren.
German.diedVerifiedBody: Du bist schon verifiziert, aber diese Runde haben dich die Dämonen erwischt.

Russian.ariaGame: Играй в DOOM и зачисти демонов, чтобы пройти проверку.
Russian.startBody: Зачисти демонов, чтобы доказать, что ты человек.
Russian.controlsHint: Стрелки или WASD для движения, Пробел или клик для стрельбы
Russian.diedVerifiedBody: Проверку вы уже прошли, но в этом раунде демоны вас одолели.

Japanese.ariaGame: DOOM をプレイして悪魔を一掃し、認証を完了しよう。
Japanese.startBody: 悪魔を一掃して、人間であることを証明しよう。
Japanese.controlsHint: 矢印キーか WASD で移動、スペースかクリックで射撃
Japanese.announceVerified: 認証済み。このまま続けてもいいよ。
Japanese.diedBody: もう一度挑戦して認証しよう。
Japanese.diedVerifiedBody: 認証はもう済んでるけど、今回は悪魔にやられたね。

Korean.ariaGame: DOOM을 플레이하고 악마를 처치해 인증을 완료하세요.
Korean.controlsHint: 방향키나 WASD로 이동, 스페이스나 클릭으로 발사
Korean.diedVerifiedBody: 인증은 이미 통과했지만, 이번 판은 악마에게 당했네요.

Indonesian.ariaGame: Mainkan DOOM dan habisi para iblis untuk verifikasi.
Indonesian.startBody: Habisi para iblis untuk membuktikan kamu manusia.
Indonesian.controlsHint: Panah atau WASD untuk bergerak, Spasi atau klik untuk menembak
Indonesian.diedVerifiedBody: Kamu sudah terverifikasi, tapi ronde ini iblis yang menang.
